title: Corruption Arc: Draconic-Vulpine
content:
The draconic-vulpine corruption arc is one of the rarer outcomes in Marches corruption research — it requires a specific combination of environmental corruption and active entity influence. Kasyrra's involvement is the differentiating factor. Without an active draconic patron, corruption in the Marches produces lupine or imp-adjacent outcomes depending on the dominant entities in the affected region.

The draconic-vulpine arc has four documented stages after baseline:

Stage 1 (Vulpine-Touched): Physical tells appear — fox ears, tail, eye color shift to amber. The cognitive architecture is unchanged. The subject is identifiably themselves. The changes are disturbing primarily because of what they signal.

Stage 2 (Full Vulpine): Frame modification, fur coverage, visible feminization. The physical changes are extensive enough that strangers may not recognize the Stage 0 individual. The subject remains cognitively themselves, which is its own difficulty.

Stage 3 (Kobold-Vulpine Hybrid): Significant size reduction, hybrid features, pronounced physical transformation. The hybrid aspect — kobold skeleton, vulpine surface — produces a form that is highly unusual even by Marches standards. Heightened sensory input across most modalities. The subject is cognitively themselves and smaller and in a body that is not what they were given at birth.

Stage 4 (Draconic Final Form): The form Kasyrra designed. Soft, luminous, hypersensitive, hyperfeminine. Not fearsome. Beautiful, by the specific aesthetic standards of draconic preference. The subject is still cognitively themselves. This is either the mercy or the cruelty of the arc, depending on who you ask.
unlock_condition: Reach Stage 2 of the corruption arc
